ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The characters placed next to each link after enter link-hint mode.
ast.target: 进入链接提示模式后，放置在每个链接旁边的字符。

ast.target: 编辑器模式下基于正则表达式的导航

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the regex for matching will be case sensitive.
ast.target: 如果启用，用于匹配的正则表达式将区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, auto jump to link if there is only one link in page
ast.target: 如果启用，当页面中只有一个链接时自动跳转到该链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, lightspeed jumps will only target characters occuring at the start of words.
ast.target: 如果启用，光速跳转将仅针对单词开头出现的字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how many characters you need to type to perform a Lightspeed jump.
ast.target: 确定执行光速跳转需要输入的字符数。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 光速正则表达式大小写敏感性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Jump to Link If Only One Link In Page
ast.target: 页面仅一个链接时跳转到链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Lightspeed only jumps to start of words
ast.target: 光速仅跳转到单词开头

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of characters for Lightspeed jump
